name: Cake Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil to 375°F in a deep-fat fryer or heavy kettle.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat together 1 1/2 cups flour and the remaining ingredients on low speed for 30 seconds, scraping the bowl constantly.
3. Beat on medium speed for 2 minutes, scraping occasionally.
4. Stir in the remaining flour until combined.
5. Turn dough onto a well-floured floured cloth-covered board; roll out to about 3/8 inch thick.
6. Cut into doughnuts using a floured doughnut cutter.
7. Slide doughnuts into hot oil with a wide spatula.
8. Turn doughnuts as they rise to the surface.
9. Fry until golden brown, 1-1 1/2 minutes on each side.
10. Remove from oil; do not prick doughnuts.
11. Drain on paper towels.
12. Serve plain, sugared, or frosted.
